violations.text: Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. No sanitizer or stoppers available for the 3-bay sink. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Proper sanitizing reviewed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2025
Facility is lacking stoppers for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2025

Inspector observed wastewater, sewage and toilet paper in restrooms. PIC instructed to thoroughly clean and sanitize restroom during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2025
The refuse area has a heavy accumulation of trash. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The chemical and wet well rooms have an accumulation of sewage, wastewater, soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed these areas are to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Employee Illness Reporting Agreement provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The outside dumpster is not closed at the side. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. In addition, trash observed around the outer wall of the building. Trash must be cleaned up in order to prevent pest activity. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024
A couple of ceiling tiles are missing in the small kitchen/storage area. Per interview of PIC, ceiling tiles have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024
